description:
The diagram illustrates a quick test for hallucination prediction using H-Neurons, flowing from left to right.

**Section 1: LLM Input**
A rounded rectangle on the left, labeled "LLM Input" with a very light cream background and a thin, dark grey border. Inside the rectangle, the text "Input Text" is displayed in a dark grey, sans-serif font. A solid black arrow of medium thickness originates from the right side of this rectangle.

**Section 2: LLM Processing**
The arrow from the "LLM Input" rectangle points to a larger rounded rectangle labeled "LLM" with a soft sky blue background and a slightly darker blue border. Inside this rectangle, the text "Language Model" is displayed in a bold, dark grey, sans-serif font, slightly larger than the other labels. From the right side of the "LLM" rectangle, two solid black arrows of medium thickness emerge. One arrow points downwards, and the other points directly to the right.

**Section 3: Hallucination Detection Branch**
The downward arrow from the "LLM" rectangle leads to a rounded rectangle labeled "H-Neurons" with a light peach background and a slightly darker peach border. Inside this rectangle, the text "Sparse Neuron Activation" is displayed in a dark grey, sans-serif font. A solid black arrow of medium thickness originates from the right side of the "H-Neurons" rectangle.

**Section 4: Hallucination Prediction**
The arrow from the "H-Neurons" rectangle points to a diamond shape labeled "Hallucination Prediction" with a light sage green background and a slightly darker green border. The text "Predict Hallucination (Yes/No)" is displayed in a dark grey, sans-serif font inside the diamond. A solid black arrow of medium thickness emerges from the right side of the diamond.

**Section 5: LLM Output Branch**
The rightward arrow from the "LLM" rectangle leads to a rounded rectangle labeled "LLM Output" with a very light cream background and a thin, dark grey border. Inside the rectangle, the text "Generated Text" is displayed in a dark grey, sans-serif font. A solid black arrow of medium thickness originates from the right side of this rectangle.

**Section 6: Comparison and Result**
The arrow from the "Hallucination Prediction" diamond and the arrow from "LLM Output" rectangle converge into a circle labeled "Comparison" with a light yellow background and a slightly darker yellow border. Inside the circle, the text "Compare Prediction vs Reality" is displayed in a dark grey, sans-serif font. A solid black arrow of medium thickness originates from the right side of this circle, leading to a rectangular box.

**Section 7: Result Output**
The arrow from the "Comparison" circle leads to a rounded rectangle on the right, labeled "Result" with a white background and a thin, dark grey border. Inside the rectangle, the text "Hallucination Detected (True/False)" is displayed in a dark grey, sans-serif font.

All arrows are solid black lines of medium thickness. All rounded rectangles, the diamond, and the circle have a thin, slightly darker border of the same color as their fill.
